sha256_scope: verbatim copy of production factory BRIEF-INPUT-SCHEMA.md (the 4-line vendoring header is excluded from this hash)
verification: On /elevate-to-brief invocation, recompute sha256 of VENDORED-SCHEMA.md with the first 4 lines stripped (the metadata header). Compare against this recorded sha256. Mismatch indicates local tampering — refuse and surface.
